title: Trial date set for former Tampa District 5 candidate after pulling gun at forum
summary: Former Hillsborough County District 5 candidate Elvis Piggott was in court on Tuesday for a pretrial hearing on charges stemming from an incident at a candidate forum last year, where he pulled a gun.

title: Smithsonian museum chief rejects criticism of its leaders as radical activists
summary: The director of the Smithsonian's National Museum of American History pushed back Tuesday against a recent White House report that branded the institution's leadership as radical activists who cannot be trusted.

title: Trial begins for man charged in 2024 death at Ruskin marina
summary: The trial for a man charged with second-degree murder in the 2024 death of another man at a Ruskin Marina began on Tuesday.

title: Hillsborough Schools discusses plan to reduce classroom screen time
summary: Hillsborough County School Board members are expected to meet again Tuesday to discuss the district’s new screen time guidance aimed at creating a better balance between technology use and unplugged time spent working and interacting in the classroom.

title: Tampa hosts SEC Media Days for the first time ever
summary: It's a landmark week for both the city of Tampa and the world of college football. For the first time in history, Tampa is hosting SEC Media Days — the unofficial kickoff to the college football season.

title: UK players joining Powerball could drive US jackpots even higher
summary: Powerball is expanding to the U.K., adding millions of new players and potentially driving jackpots higher for lottery players in the U.S.

title: Former Florida jail official pleads guilty to accepting bribe, smuggling cell phone
summary: Accepting a bribe and smuggling a cell phone at a detention facility in Florida has a 50-year-old Inverness man facing a maximum of 15 years in federal prison.

title: Tourist couple stabbed near Athens’ Acropolis in apparent random attack
summary: A man allegedly stabbed and wounded two tourists near Athens’ Acropolis before being detained Tuesday in what police said appeared to be a random attack.

title: Oklahoma lineman Eddy Pierre-Louis fulfills childhood dream at SEC Media Days in Tampa
summary: The Tampa native said he made a video at age 7 declaring he would play for Oklahoma. Now he's a team leader heading into the SEC season.

title: Charlie Kirk sign removed from Tennessee highway after veterans object
summary: Signs honoring conservative activist Charlie Kirk are being removed from a highway in Tennessee after Vietnam veterans objected to their placement.

title: $23k in cash, dozens of gambling machines seized at illegal Bradenton operation: MCSO
summary: Manatee County Sheriff's Office announced Tuesday an illegal gambling operation in Bradenton has been shut down.

title: SafeSport Center to begin publicizing names of people who go on its banned list
summary: The U.S. Center for SafeSport began making public announcements of people placed on its disciplinary database Tuesday, a move designed to increase transparency.

title: Lakeland takes next step to 1-year moratorium on data center developments
summary: The City of Lakeland takes the next step to a 1-year moratorium on data center developments with the first reading of the ordinance.

title: McDonald’s latest breakfast sandwich adds a sweet twist
summary: McDonald’s has added a Honey Brown Butter Bacon, Egg & Cheese Biscuit to its breakfast lineup for a limited time at U.S. restaurants.

summary: A new Zelle report found 76% of Gen Z consumers who covered group expenses were never fully repaid, and nearly half say it pushed them into debt.

title: News to Know for July 21
summary: Families desperate for answers after losing SNAP benefits to fraud. Plus, Pebble Creek rezoning case returns to public hearing.

title: Susan Solves It: Personal loans
summary: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises comparing interest rates, borrowing only for necessary expenses and having a repayment plan before taking out a personal loan.

title: Affordable St. Pete produce market keeps prices down and boosts the community
summary: Affordable St. Pete produce market keeps prices down and boosts the community. Kelli Casto's Produce PAC supports area farmers and helps seniors in need.

title: Arizona’s Republican primaries highlight party divide over Trump
summary: Arizona Republicans vote in pivotal primaries for governor, Congress and key statewide offices as the party seeks a comeback in a key battleground state.

title: Florida judge to weigh whether James Fishback can remain on gubernatorial ballot
summary: A closely watched legal battle over Florida’s race for governor begins Tuesday morning in Tallahassee, where a judge will hear arguments over whether James Fishback is eligible to serve as governor.

title: TSA security to be privatized at Tampa International Airport under new federal program
summary: Tampa International Airport will privatize most TSA operations, just months after Pres. Trump unveiled a 2027 budget proposal that called for handing more airport security over to private companies.
